V0417_01_00_00_0.text:
My name is Marin.
Of Barian World.

V0417_01_00_01_0.text: If it's a battle you want, it's a battle you'll get!

V0417_01_00_02_0.text:
I must not lose!
For Nash!

V0417_01_00_03_0.text:
This is our destiny.
And fate is written in stone.

V0417_01_00_04_0.text: If you get in my way, I have no choice but to end you.

V0417_01_00_05_0.text:
Sorry to disappoint you, but I'm Marin.
There is no Rio.

V0417_01_00_06_0.text: It is like you to come here and help your friends.

V0417_01_00_07_0.text:
You've mastered your Numbers.
But so have I.

V0417_01_00_08_0.text: When I freeze you in ice, your reign of terror will be over!

V0417_01_00_09_0.text:
Vector!
You will pay for trying to destroy me and Nash!

V0417_01_00_10_0.text: I will prove to you that I am a Barian!

V0417_01_00_11_0.text: Nash, let me remind you which side you fight for.

V0417_03_00_00_0.text: In the blink of an eye, you'll just be a bad memory!

V0417_03_00_04_0.text: Celebrating too early will be your fatal flaw!

V0417_03_00_05_0.text:
I will do what must be done.
Even if costs me everything.

V0417_05_00_00_0.text:
Nash...
I know you're here with me!

V0417_06_01_01_0.text: I'm surprised you think that'll work.

V0417_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over my Set card!

V0417_08_00_00_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Monster Reborn!

V0417_08_00_01_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Lemuria, the Forgotten City!

V0417_08_00_02_0.text: Lemuria, the Forgotten City's effect activates!

V0417_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Diamond Dust!

V0417_08_00_03_1.text: All WATER monsters are destroyed, and you take damage!

V0417_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Trap, Mirror Force!

V0417_08_00_04_1.text: All your monsters in Attack Position are destroyed!

V0417_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Torrential Tribute!

V0417_08_00_05_1.text: It destroys every monster on the field!

V0417_08_00_07_0.text: I activate Rank-Up-Magic - The Seventh One!

V0417_08_00_09_0.text: I activate my Field Spell, Barian Untopia!

V0417_08_00_11_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Seventh Ascension!

V0417_08_00_12_0.text: I activate Seventh Ascension's effect from my Graveyard!

V0417_08_00_13_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Seventh Force!

V0417_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Rank-Up-Magic Quick Chaos!

V0417_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Rebirth of the Seventh Emperors!

V0417_08_00_16_0.text: I activate the Trap, Reincarnation of the Seventh Emperors!

V0417_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Seventh Eternity!

V0417_09_00_00_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Ragnazero's effect!

V0417_09_00_01_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Ragnafinity's effect!

V0417_09_00_02_0.text: Ragnafinity can revive itself when it has an Overlay Unit!

V0417_09_00_03_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Zerofyne's effect!

V0417_09_00_04_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Zereort's effect!

V0417_09_00_05_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Crystalzero's effect!

V0417_09_00_06_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to power Crystalzero Lancer's effect!

V0417_09_00_06_1.text: All your monsters' effects are negated this turn!

V0417_09_00_07_1.text: When it's destroyed in battle, I'm able to resurrect it!

V0417_09_00_08_0.text: I activate Guard Penguin's effect from my hand!

V0417_09_00_09_1.text: If it has more ATK than it started with, it deals damage!

V0417_09_00_10_0.text: I discard a card to activate Blizzard Thunderbird's effect!

V0417_09_00_11_0.text: When Sirenorca Special Summons itself, its effect activates!

V0417_09_00_12_0.text: I target a WATER monster to activate Crystal Shark's effect!

V0417_09_00_12_1.text: I Special Summon this card, and the target loses ATK!

V0417_09_00_13_0.text: Migratory Zereort's effect activates from my hand!

V0417_09_00_14_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Migratory Zereort's effect!

V0417_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0417_13_00_02_0.text:
Descend from the skies!
Ice Beast Zerofyne!

V0417_13_00_03_0.text:
Break your shackles!
Ice Princess Zereort!

V0417_13_00_05_0.text:
Clad in black armor!
Full Armored Crystalzero Lancer!

V0417_16_00_00_0.text: This single strike will end your existence!

V0417_21_00_00_0.text: Beginning to doubt your own brilliance?

V0417_21_00_01_0.text: Your monsters are not strong enough to survive against me.

V0417_27_00_02_0.text: I can't take much more of that...

V0417_28_00_00_0.text: Whatever fate awaits, Nash and I will face it together.

V0417_28_00_01_0.text:
I've decided to be a Barian...
I can't go back...

V0417_28_00_02_0.text:
Enough of you.
You will never be stronger than me.

V0417_28_00_03_0.text:
I'm a Barian now.
Mind and body.

V0417_28_00_04_0.text: Bronk, I always found the spirit you bring to Dueling...

V0417_28_00_05_0.text: Whatever you decide to do, I'll be right there with you.

V0417_28_00_06_0.text:
Vector!
That's not just payback from me - but also Nash!

V0417_28_00_07_0.text: I always knew you were a coward.

V0417_29_00_00_0.text:
Reginald...
I'm just happy we could face our fate together.

V0417_29_00_01_0.text: So this is how my future ends...

V0417_29_00_03_0.text:
We were so close...
I'm sorry, Nash.

V0417_29_00_04_0.text: Nash, don't forget that you're never alone.

V0417_29_00_05_1.text: Every second I spent with you was a gift, Reginald...

V0417_29_00_06_0.text: Please use those skills to help Nash.

V0417_30_00_00_0.text:
Did you forget who I am?
That was rude.

V0417_30_00_01_0.text:
I remember everything...
Nash and I...

V0417_30_00_02_0.text: We returned as the humans Reginald and Rio Kastle...

V0417_32_00_01_0.text: Fate has led Nash and I to Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!

V0417_33_00_00_0.text: This is the power of the Barians!

V0417_34_00_00_0.text: Since we're Barians, our friends are now our enemies.

V0417_34_00_01_0.text: My attacks have been hurting my brother Nash all this time?

V0417_34_00_02_0.text: What's wrong? Aren't you going to activate your effect?

V0417_34_00_03_0.text: You're finally realizing that you're nearing your end.

V0417_34_00_04_0.text: You thought your combo was unbreakable, but you were wrong!

V0417_34_00_06_0.text: Why make a move that only hurts yourself?

V0417_34_00_07_0.text: Unlike Nash, you don’t command any respect.

V0417_34_00_08_0.text: Brother, your people are depending on you to protect them.

V0417_34_00_09_0.text: Brother, I will offer up my own soul to Abyss.

V0417_35_00_00_0.text:
My name is Marin.
There is no Rio.

V0417_36_00_00_0.text: There's no need to stretch this Duel any further.

V0417_36_00_02_0.text: This Duel rests on your shoulders!

V0417_36_00_06_0.text: I couldn't be successful without you, my friend.

V0417_36_00_07_0.text: When we're on the same page, we're unbeatable, Dumon!

V0417_36_00_08_0.text: Dumon, there are few I trust more in this position!

V0417_36_00_09_0.text: This Duel is in your hands, Mizar!

V0417_37_00_00_0.text: The infinite power that even freezes time!

V0417_37_00_01_0.text: Freeze your foes with your soul of ice!
